rulings.Case Title: DESIREE BARNES et al VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Oct. 05, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT AMERICAN TECHNOLOGIES,INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant with leave to amend to allege facts re wrongful motive intent or purpose. See Cyrus vs Haveson =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARILOU D SAMSON VS. ONE WEST BANK, FSB et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Oct. 05, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT ONE WEST BANK, FSB, and US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. 1) Sustain without leave to amend as to the 1st, 2nd and 3rd causes of action. Plaintiff failed to show possibility of amendment in the opposition. 2) Sustain with leave to amend as to 4th cause of action to allege in good faith all elements of quiet title clause. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KARLEEN GRIFFIN VS. JAGDISH DAYAL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Oct. 05, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT JAGDISH DAYAL and SARITA DAYAL's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant with leave to amend, plaintiff's opposition stricken. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KARLEEN GRIFFIN VS. JAGDISH DAYAL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Oct. 05, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT JAGDISH DAYAL and SARITA DAYAL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend, plaintiff's opposition stricken. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES MORRISON VS. MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Orders To Consolidate The Unlawful Detainer Action With The Instant Action
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Oct. 05, 2012. Line 4 - PLAINTIFF JAMES MORRISON's Motion For Orders To Consolidate The Unlawful Detainer Action With The Instant Action. Deny without prejudice. Demurrer was sustained with leave to amend on September 28, 2012. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEMMIE B. ACOSTA et al VS. MORTGAGE FUND 08, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Oct. 05, 2012. Line 7 - Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction. Hearing required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DMG ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. LAURENCE FAULKS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Oct. 05, 2012. Line 5 - DEFENDANT LAURENCE FAULKS' Motion For New Trial. Deny - Motion for new trial; moving party is not a tenant at sufferance protected by rent ordinance, but a trustor whose property was obtained by a bona fide purchaser at a non judicial foreclosure sale. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHING KIT LEE et al VS. CHARLEMAGNE EVANGELISTA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft To Answer Pltf'S First Set Of Form Interrgoatoirres
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Oct. 05, 2012. Line 6 - PLAINTIFF SHING LEE and JULIE LEE's Motion To Compel Defendant To Answer Plaintiff'S First Set Of Form Interrgoatoirres. Grant subject to opposition plus monetary sanctions $681.00 =(501/REQ)
